LAW AND MOTION 302, RE: PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT UNDER TERMS OF STIPULATED SETTLEMENT. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S UNOPPOSED "MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT UNDER TERMS OF STIPULATED SETTLEMENT" IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
Motion And Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-10-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Plaintiff PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC's motion for entry of judgment under terms of stipulated settlement.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC's unopposed "motion for entry of judgment under terms of stipulated settlement" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not reported. (302/RBU)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-01-2021 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-02-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-19-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
